title: Anthony Gordon Signs with Barça
description: La Blaugrana have officially completed the massive signing of Anthony Gordon from Newcastle United for a fee of £80M. The English winger is already has long been a fan of Barcelona and is excited to be here.

title: Rashford Loan Decision Looming
description: Reports show Barça may decline the $35M permanent buy option for Marcus Rashford. A secondary loan extension from Manchester United is currently being evaluated.

title: Camp Nou Renovation Funding Updates
description: The club is acquiring secondary funding allocations beyond the original Goldman Sachs loan to compensate for budget deviations and finalize stadium renovations.

title: Targeting Julian Álvarez for Striker Role
description: Sporting director Deco has prioritized Julian Álvarez over Victor Osimhen as the long-term successor to lead the line alongside Robert Lewandowski.
